title: Potion Totems
body:
![Potion Totems](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ScaredRabbitNL/resources/main/PotionTotems/pt_text_big.png)

![Available for NeoForge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ScaredRabbitNL/resources/refs/heads/main/badges/cozy_neoforge_vector.svg) ![Requires Resourcefullib](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ScaredRabbitNL/resources/refs/heads/main/badges/cozy_resourcefullib_vector.svg)  ![Requires Fzzy Config](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ScaredRabbitNL/resources/refs/heads/main/badges/cozy_fzzy-config_vector.svg)

![strip](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ScaredRabbitNL/resources/main/PotionTotems/strip.png)

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ScaredRabbitNL/resources/c9d430112b7fd888ef96ea9a80daf8a711c6dbe6/badges/about_compact_vector.svg)

Dying after your death? Not today! Or maybe today? It all depends on the potion you use! Infuse a totem with **____any____** potion to gain it's effects after using the totem!

![strip](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ScaredRabbitNL/resources/main/PotionTotems/strip.png)

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ScaredRabbitNL/resources/82d3b17da11a81f4c16a36779ba524c09a5f7c6a/badges/compact_features_vector.svg)

**▶️ Configurable time and amplifier**

**▶️ Infuser that combines Totems Of Undying with potions**

**▶️ Advanced Infuser that combines Infused Totems with potions**

**▶️ Custom villager with predefined potion (totem)s**


![strip](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ScaredRabbitNL/resources/main/PotionTotems/strip.png)

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ScaredRabbitNL/resources/refs/heads/main/badges/compact_planned_features_46h.png)

**Infuser related**

**▶️ Better model and textures for the Infuser**

**▶️ Make the Infuser use power**

**▶️ Improve Infuser textures**

**▶️ Add a BlockEntityRenderer to the Infuser**

![strip](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ScaredRabbitNL/resources/main/PotionTotems/strip.png)
